Hi Steven, I checked my Visual Studio environment. SonarQube for Visual Studio is not currently installed, and the Extension Manager cannot browse the Visual Studio Marketplace feed from this VM.

Since I’m still doing the developer validation for SPESTG-480 before raising the PR, I wanted to check the proper route for early Sonar validation.

Do you know if SonarQube for Visual Studio should be requested through FixIT / approved software installation, or is there another way to trigger/validate the Sonar scan against my feature branch before PR?

I’m asking so I can catch any Sonar findings earlier while I’m still completing the validation work.
